title: lobelia oreas
intro: Lobelia oreas, also known as Snow Plant, is a rare and unique alpine plant native to the western coast of North America, characterized by its white or pinkish flowers and succulent leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and stimulant effects, which are attributed to the presence of lobeline, a compound that acts as a bronchodilator and cough suppressant. Lobelia oreas has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory problems such as bronchitis, asthma, and tuberculosis, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or capsules to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Lobelia oreas due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
